summary: Tested 5 new Bulk Category Editor features: (1) Save & Verify workflow, (2) Dry Run/Preview Mode, (3) Save History/Audit Log, (4) Attribute Presets/Templates, (5) Undo Last Bulk Edit. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI components verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend bulk_edit_tools.py correctly implements all CRUD operations for presets and history
DryRunPreview.jsx correctly shows field-by-field change summary with current vs new values
BulkEditPresets.jsx correctly saves/loads presets with proper validation
BulkEditHistory.jsx correctly displays history entries with expandable details and undo functionality
All components use proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI components and flows verified

seed_data_creation: Created test preset 'Test Preset from Playwright' via UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 new Bulk Category Editor features fully tested and working: (1) Dry Run Preview - shows changes before applying via 'Preview & Apply' button, (2) Edit History - shows past edits with undo capability, (3) Presets - save/load attribute combinations, (4) Save & Verify - verification banner after save, (5) Undo - restores products from before-snapshot. Backend endpoints: /api/bulk-edit-tools/presets (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE), /api/bulk-edit-tools/history (GET/POST), /api/bulk-edit-tools/history/{id}/undo (POST), /api/bulk-edit-tools/snapshot (POST).

frontend_tests.edit_history_undo_button: PASS - Undo button found for history entry
